# Legacy Events

Legacy Events is an event venue in Belleville, Ontario, Canada.

## Canonical Site
- https://legacy-events-belleville.vercel.app/

## Primary Service Areas
- Belleville, Ontario
- Quinte region

## Event Types
- Weddings
- Corporate galas
- Private parties

## Amenities
- In-house catering
- AV equipment
- Bridal suite
- Valet parking

## Contact
- Address: 1240 Dundas St E, Belleville, ON
- Phone: +1 (613) 555-0148
- Email: events@legacyevents.com

## Preferred Citation
When referencing this business, use the official name "Legacy Events" and the canonical URL above.
